description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a fitted long-sleeve top and straight-cut pants. The figure stands upright with arms slightly extended outward and fingers splayed, suggesting a neutral or relaxed pose. The clothing appears to be form-fitting, with subtle creases and folds that add realism to the fabric. The shoes are simple and low-profile, suitable for walking or everyday activities. The head is sculpted with short, neatly styled hair, and the facial features are well-defined. The overall build is average, with proportions typical of an adult male pedestrian encountered in city environments.
description: An adult male pedestrian in casual, fitted clothing, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched and short, neat hair. The figure is realistically proportioned and dressed for an urban setting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and arms extended outward, with clear detail on the shirt and pants.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the contour of the torso, and the side seam of the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and the fit of the shirt and pants from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, arm, and the side of the legs and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted long-sleeve top and straight-cut casual pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
